The word 'ዘይትዋሰቡ' was split into two distinct words: 'ዘይት' and 'ዋሰቡ' (root 'መዋስ'). The input batch was processed through 8 scholarly protocols. Several words were identified as proper nouns (e.g., 'ሮሚሮ', 'ሞንቴኪ', 'ዓደዋው') and their roots were kept as themselves. Merged words were split: 'ከስባ' into 'ከ' and 'ስባ'; 'ከሃቫላንጅ' into 'ከ' and 'ሃቫላንጅ'; 'ከሚናቀርበው' into 'ከ' and 'ሚናቀርበው'; 'እንደጻፉና' into 'እንደጻፉ' and 'ና'; 'እንደሚፈልገኝና' into 'እንደሚፈልገኝ' and 'ና'; 'ስለገላገላቸው' into 'ስለ' and 'ገላገላቸው'. The single-character preposition 'ከ' was discarded due to the size constraint (Protocol 7). A visual OCR correction was applied to 'ያስተወዋቀ', changing it to 'ያስተዋወቀ' to reflect the correct Amharic spelling. 'እንጂኜሮች' was lemmatized to 'ኢንጂነር' as a common spelling variation for the root. 'ባለመን' was treated as a single compound noun. 'በማስፋፋቷ' was categorized as a Noun, representing the gerund/infinitive form used nominally. 'ና' and 'ስለ' were correctly identified as Conjunction and Preposition respectively.

All included words and their roots adhere to the minimum two-character length constraint.
